title: athyrium squamulosum
intro: Athyrium squamulosum, also known as the scaly lady fern, is a type of flowering plant in the fern family (Athyriaceae) that is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Athyrium squamulosum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
